final_prompt.prompt:
Create a brand exposure splash screen for OPPO Find X9 Ultra, 1080×1920 portrait format, prioritizing visual impact for product launch.

Style/medium: cinematic product launch splash screen, high-gloss tech aesthetic with the restrained confidence of contemporary East Asian brand advertising
Composition: vertical 9:16 canvas, Find X9 Ultra as the commanding center weight, generous breathing room above and below the device
Subject: OPPO Find X9 Ultra smartphone, hero product shot with screen illuminated
Scene/backdrop: minimalist gradient void, the device floating in a space of quiet authority
Lighting/mood: dramatic product lighting with sharp highlights and deep shadows, the hush before a revelation
Color palette: neutral graphite meeting electric accent notes, the tension between restraint and energy
Materials/textures: brushed titanium and ceramic glass surfaces catching light, the cold precision of premium industrial design
Text (verbatim): OPPO Find X9 Ultra
Constraints: 1080×1920 portrait format, brand name and product name must be clearly visible, visual hierarchy prioritizes device over typography
Avoid: cluttered backgrounds, multiple competing focal points, generic stock-tech aesthetic, excessive text layers
